# Jocy Wolff

> Personal website of Jocy Wolff, Senior Software Engineer. Contains a CV, an interactive bingo page, and annotated song lyrics with translations.

## Lyrics

Each song has its own page at /lyrics/{song-id} with:
- Original lyrics (language varies by song)
- English translations line-by-line
- Annotations explaining idioms, wordplay, cultural references, historical context, slang, and named entities

### Songs

- [Musik ist keine Lösung — Alligatoah](/lyrics/alligatoah-musik-ist-keine-lösung): German rap lyrics (2015). Annotations cover Alligatoah's internal personas, German slang, wordplay, and cultural references.

## Notes

- /lyrics-editor is an authoring tool, not intended for indexing.
- All lyrics are presented for educational and linguistic commentary purposes.
